aic.description: AIC code — Italian marketing authorisation number

classe.description: NHS reimbursement class: A (reimbursed), H (hospital), C (not reimbursed)

ricetta.description: Prescription type (e.g. RR = restricted prescription, SOP = OTC)

prezzoAlPubblico.description: Retail price as shown in AIFA list (formatted string)

prezzoAlPubblicoEur.description: Retail price as numeric EUR value

prezzoDiRiferimento.description: NHS reference price as shown in AIFA list (maximum reimbursed amount)

prezzoDiRiferimentoEur.description: NHS reference price as numeric EUR value

differenzaEur.description: Price gap: retail minus reference (amount patient must pay extra)

differenzaPercent.description: Price gap as percentage of reference price

previousPriceEur.description: Previous month's retail price (only when includeHistoric=true)

priceChange.description: Month-over-month price change in EUR (only when includeHistoric=true)

dataAggiornamento.description: Date of this AIFA list update (ISO format)

fonte.description: Direct URL of the AIFA CSV source file
